Select Theme

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Agent
    Interface for agents in the pub/sub system.
    BinOpAgent
    An Agent that gets two numeric inputs and publishes one numeric output.
    Config
    Interface for a configuration of agents and topics.
    ConfLoader
    Servlet for /upload.
    DivAgent
     
    GenericConfig
    Generic configuration that creates agents from a text file.
    Graph
    Represents a directed graph as a list of nodes.
    HtmlGraphWriter
    Creates an HTML view for the computational graph.
    HtmlLoader
    Servlet that loads static HTML files from a folder.
    HTTPServer
    Interface for the simple HTTP server in the project.
    HttpUtil
     
    IncAgent
    A simple agent that increases a number by one.
    Main
    Main class that starts the local server and registers the project servlets.
    Message
    Represents a message in the system.
    MinusAgent
     
    MulAgent
     
    MyHTTPServer
    A small generic HTTP server for the project.
    Node
    Represents one node in a directed graph.
    ParallelAgent
    ParallelAgent is a decorator for an Agent.
    PlusAgent
    A simple agent that adds two numbers.
    RequestParser
    A small parser for simple HTTP requests.
    RequestParser.RequestInfo
    Holds the important data that was taken from the HTTP request.
    Servlet
    Small servlet interface used by the local HTTP server.
    Topic
    Represents a topic in the pub/sub system.
    TopicDisplayer
    Servlet for /publish.
    TopicManagerSingleton
    Singleton class that manages all topics.
    TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
    Inner class for the singleton instance.
